Thomas Wright, AIA
Project Architect, New York, NY
thomas.wright@example.com | 555-201-3015 | linkedin.com/in/thomas-wright-aia

SUMMARY
Licensed architect (AIA) with 9 years designing commercial and mixed-use
buildings in New York City. Leads projects from schematic design through
construction documents and administration, coordinating consultants and
navigating NYC building codes and permitting.

EXPERIENCE
Project Architect — Skyline Architecture Studio (2019–present)
- Lead design development and construction documents for commercial and
  multifamily projects up to 300,000 SF, producing drawings in Revit and AutoCAD.
- Coordinate structural, MEP, and facade consultants; manage BIM models and
  resolve constructability issues during construction administration.
- Navigate NYC Department of Buildings permitting, zoning, and building-code
  compliance through approvals.

Architectural Designer — Urban Form Partners (2014–2019)
- Produced schematic design and design-development drawings; built physical and
  digital models and assisted with construction administration.

SKILLS
Architecture, Revit, AutoCAD, BIM, schematic design, design development,
construction documents, construction administration, building codes, permitting,
zoning, drawings, specifications, consultant coordination, construction

LICENSE & EDUCATION
Registered Architect (AIA), New York
M.Arch, Columbia GSAPP, 2014
B.A. Architecture, Cornell University, 2011
